start: 👋 Hello! I track TV series and movies. Use the buttons below: • {btn_search_series} — find a series in TMDB • {btn_search_movies} — find a movie • {btn_list} — your tracked list • {btn_help} — quick guide • {btn_language} — change language I will notify you when TMDB updates data (about every {minutes} min).
help: 📖 How to use Series: «{btn_search_series}» → pick a result → «{btn_track}» → choose a season. Movies: «{btn_search_movies}» → «{btn_track_movie}» → choose a release region. Your list: «{btn_list}». /cancel — cancel text input.
prompt_search_series: Type a series title (min 2 chars).\nCancel: button «❌ Cancel» or /cancel
prompt_search_movies: Type a movie title (min 2 chars).\nCancel: button «❌ Cancel» or /cancel
search_empty: Nothing found. Try another title or tap Search again.
already_tracking: ⚠️ You are already tracking this season.
already_tracking_movie: ⚠️ This movie is already tracked for region {region}.
added_to_watchlist: ✅ {series_name} — Season {season_number} added to your watchlist! Already aired episodes: {aired} 🔔 I will notify you after TMDB updates data (check every ~{minutes} min).
add_failed: ⚠️ Could not add (maybe already in your list).
idle_hint: Use the buttons below or tap «{btn_search_series}» / «{btn_search_movies}».
inline_hint: Open bot and tap Search, or type at least 2 chars
prompt_search: Type a series title (at least 2 characters).\nCancel: button «❌ Cancel» or /cancel
watchlist_remove_hint: Tap a button below to remove:
